headline: Stock Market Today, April 2: Nokia Rises on Surge in Bullish Options Activity

headline: Cisco Report: Strategic Wireless Investments are Driving Higher ROI for Enterprises in the AI Era
summary: Cisco today released its inaugural State of Wireless Report, revealing that Wi-Fi has evolved into a strategic growth engine capable of delivering a multiplier effect—where a single network investment drives compounding returns across employee productivity, customer engagement, and revenue. headline: Court Square Capital Partners Announces Acquisition of CallTower
summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--Court Square Capital Partners ("Court Square"), a leading U.S. middle market private equity firm, today announced it has acquired a majority stake in CallTower (the "Company"), a global leader in enterprise-class cloud communications and collaboration solutions. Court Square is acquiring the company from BV Investment Partners, which acquired a majority stake in 2023.

raw.headline: Court Square Capital Partners Announces Acquisition of CallTower
raw.summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--Court Square Capital Partners ("Court Square"), a leading U.S. middle market private equity firm, today announced it has acquired a majority stake in CallTower (the "Company"), a global leader in enterprise-class cloud communications and collaboration solutions. Court Square is acquiring the company from BV Investment Partners, which acquired a majority stake in 2023.

headline: BV Investment Partners Announces Sale of CallTower
summary: BV Investment Partners ("BV"), a middle-market private equity firm focused on tech-enabled business services and solutions, today announced the majority sale of CallTower, a global leader in managed cloud communications, contact center and collaboration solutions, to Court Square Capital Partners. BV and CallTower management will retain a minority stake in the business.

headline: Cisco Makes Its Debut at COMPUTEX Keynote! SVP Jeremy Foster to Unveil "A Full Stack Approach to AI"
summary: COMPUTEX 2026 will take place from June 2 to June 5 at Taipei World Trade Center Hall 1 and Nangang Exhibition Center Halls 1 and 2. TAITRA, the co-organizer, is proud to announce that Cisco, a global leader in networking and computing, will join the COMPUTEX Keynote lineup for the first time. Jeremy Foster, Senior Vice President, will deliver a keynote address on June 1, sharing how a full-stack approach can help organizations transform AI from a concept into a mission-critical reality.

headline: Truist Cautious on Corning (GLW) Despite Strong AI and Cloud Spending Tailwinds
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 31, Truist initiated coverage of Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) with a Hold rating. It set a $125 price target on the stock. The firm said networking and hardware companies are closely tied to rising AI and cloud spending. […]
